title: Typography Or Graduation Poster 2 AI
sourceTitle: Typography Or Graduation Poster 2 AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: handwritten memory poster built around FIELD NOTES. Subject: FIELD NOTES is the oversized hero headline and must be the first readable visual element. Scene: sunlit artisan studio with wooden table, clay tools, drying shelves, linen apron, and soft dust in the air appears as a large soft-focus memory photo, supported by nostalgic atmosphere and subtle lyric text. Composition: Fixed vertical poster composition with a large blurred memory photo, oversized handwritten title, and compact supporting text block. Style: Graduation-season playlist-cover poster with low-resolution photo texture, film grain, soft blur, dark vignette, and emotional farewell atmosphere. Color Palette: Unified palette chosen to support the subject, clean contrast, readable details, and a premium finished image. Lighting: Believable polished lighting with controlled highlights, readable shadows, depth, and artifact-free detail. Camera: Clean camera perspective that keeps the main subject readable and preserves the template composition. Typography: FIELD NOTES appears as giant expressive handwritten lettering; Walk through the wind / Keep the light and Larus Canus appear as tiny restrained credit text. Signature Elements: FIELD NOTES, sunlit artisan studio with wooden table, clay tools, drying shelves, linen apron, and soft dust in the air, Walk through the wind / Keep the light, and Larus Canus define the reusable handwritten memory poster. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Typography Or Graduation Poster 2 Field Notes

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: handwritten memory poster built around AFTER RAIN. Subject: AFTER RAIN is the oversized hero headline and must be the first readable visual element. Scene: misty greenhouse with metal frames, condensation, plant labels, terracotta pots, and filtered morning light appears as a large soft-focus memory photo, supported by nostalgic atmosphere and subtle lyric text. Composition: Fixed vertical poster composition with a large blurred memory photo, oversized handwritten title, and compact supporting text block. Style: Graduation-season playlist-cover poster with low-resolution photo texture, film grain, soft blur, dark vignette, and emotional farewell atmosphere. Color Palette: Unified palette chosen to support the subject, clean contrast, readable details, and a premium finished image. Lighting: Believable polished lighting with controlled highlights, readable shadows, depth, and artifact-free detail. Camera: Clean camera perspective that keeps the main subject readable and preserves the template composition. Typography: AFTER RAIN appears as giant expressive handwritten lettering; Save the bright moments / let them stay and Mira Vale appear as tiny restrained credit text. Signature Elements: AFTER RAIN, misty greenhouse with metal frames, condensation, plant labels, terracotta pots, and filtered morning light, Save the bright moments / let them stay, and Mira Vale define the reusable handwritten memory poster. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.

promptTranslations.ko:
아래 영어 이미지 생성 프롬프트를 사용하세요. 보이는 텍스트, 브랜드명, 변수 값, 매개변수는 영어로 유지하세요.
